mapper.select: SELECT id, type_code as typeCode, type_name as typeName, description, sort_order as sortOrder FROM t_bas_fee_type_dict ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, status_code as statusCode, status_name as statusName, description, sort_order as sortOrder FROM t_bas_fee_status_dict ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, method_code as methodCode, method_name as methodName, description, sort_order as sortOrder FROM t_bas_payment_method_dict ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, status_code as statusCode, status_name as statusName, description, sort_order as sortOrder FROM t_bas_payment_status_dict ORDER BY sort_order ASC
